TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi sealed SKColorspacePrimariesCicp extends System.Enum

Docs.summary: Specifies the color primaries using CICP (Coding-Independent Code Points) values as defined in ITU-T H.273.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
`SKColorspacePrimariesCicp` identifies the set of primary colors for a color space using the numeric codes defined in ITU-T H.273 / ISO 23091-2. Pass a value from this enumeration to <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace.CreateCicp*> along with a transfer function to create a fully specified color space.
This is a value type and does not require disposal.
## Examples
```csharp // Create an sRGB-primaries color space with an sRGB (Rec. 709) transfer function using var colorSpace = SKColorSpace.CreateCicp( SKColorspacePrimariesCicp.Rec709, SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp.Iec6196621); ```

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp GenericFilm = int32(8)
.field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp ItuTH273Value22 = int32(22)

Docs.summary: Color primaries defined by ITU-T H.273 value 22, used for certain EBU and other broadcast applications (CICP value 22).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec2020 = int32(9)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.2020 / BT.2100 wide-gamut color primaries used for HDR and UHD content (CICP value 9).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec470SystemBg = int32(5)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System B/G color primaries used for older PAL broadcast standards (CICP value 5).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec470SystemM = int32(4)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System M color primaries used for older NTSC broadcast standards (CICP value 4).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec601 = int32(6)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.601 / SMPTE ST 170M color primaries used for standard-definition video (CICP value 6).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Rec709 = int32(1)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.709 color primaries used for HDTV and sRGB (CICP value 1).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteEg4321 = int32(12)

Docs.summary: SMPTE EG 432-1 (P3-D65) color primaries used for digital cinema and Display P3 (CICP value 12).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteRp4312 = int32(11)

Docs.summary: SMPTE RP 431-2 (P3-DCI) color primaries used for digital cinema projection (CICP value 11).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteSt240 = int32(7)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 240 color primaries used for early HDTV production (CICP value 7).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp SmpteSt4281 = int32(10)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 428-1 (XYZ) color primaries used for digital cinema (CICP value 10).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp Unknown = int32(0)

Docs.summary: Unknown or unspecified color primaries (CICP value 0).
